title: Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Assam

overview.short: Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary is a Morangi located in Golaghat district of Assam in India.
overview.description: Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary is a Morangi located in Golaghat district of Assam in India. This wildlife sanctuary covers an area of 97.15 km2. It is located 25 km from Golaghat town and about 318 km from Guwahati LGBI Airport. The forest type is tropical semi-evergreen with pockets of pure evergreen, interspersed with small forest marshes.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jorhat Airport (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (59 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Nambor - Doigrung Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
